name: GetYourGuide Tours & Activities Distribution API
what_it_does: GetYourGuide tours and activities distribution REST API for travel OTAs, airlines, hotels, and travel platforms to access and sell 300,000+ tours, activities, and experiences across 11,000+ destinations through GetYourGuide's affiliate and partner program, enabling booking of day trips, guided tours, museum tickets, skip-the-line passes, and adventure activities with real-time availability and confirmation. Enables AI agents to manage activity search for destination experience discovery automation, handle availability retrieval for tours and tickets booking automation, access booking confirmation for experience reservation automation, retrieve product details for activity content automation, manage cancellation and refund for experience booking reversal automation, handle affiliate deeplink generation for activity monetization automation, access activity categories for content filtering automation, retrieve pricing for experience cost automation, manage booking voucher for digital ticket delivery automation, and integrate GetYourGuide with travel platforms, itinerary planners, and OTAs for end-to-end travel experience booking automation.
use_cases: Searching and displaying tours and activities for travel itinerary automation agents
Booking skip-the-line museum tickets and guided tours from travel concierge agents
Embedding activity recommendations for destination content platform automation agents
Generating affiliate booking links for travel blog monetization automation agents
not_for: Flight or hotel booking (GetYourGuide is activities and experiences only)
Transportation bookings (use Duffel or Kiwi for flights, car rental APIs for cars)
Private charter or custom tour operations (GetYourGuide is inventory-based marketplace)
best_when: A travel OTA, hotel, airline, or itinerary platform wanting AI agents to book and display tours, activities, and experiences from GetYourGuide's 300,000+ inventory across 11,000+ destinations through their partner distribution API.
avoid_when: PARTNER PROGRAM REQUIRED FOR BOOKING API: GetYourGuide booking API requires approved partner program; automated self-service booking API without partner approval creates no booking capability; automated affiliate API key for booking creates read-only access only. AVAILABILITY IS REAL-TIME AND CAPACITY-LIMITED: GetYourGuide activities have limited capacity and real-time availability; automated booking without pre-checking availability creates booking_unavailable error; automated availability must be checked immediately before booking. CANCELLATION POLICIES VARY BY PRODUCT: GetYourGuide cancellation windows vary per activity (24h, 48h, non-refundable); automated refund assumption for all cancellations creates non-refundable cancellation for some products; automated cancellation must check product-specific policy. VOUCHERS ARE DIGITAL AND TIME-SENSITIVE: GetYourGuide booking confirmation includes digital voucher with QR code; automated voucher delivery must reach customer before activity date; automated delayed delivery creates unusable voucher for timed experiences.

auth.notes: GetYourGuide uses API key for partner authentication. REST API with JSON. Berlin, Germany HQ. Founded 2009 by Johannes Reck and Tao Tao. Backed by KKR, SoftBank Vision Fund, Temasek ($1.6B+ raised, $2B+ valuation). Products: Tours, activities, day trips, museum tickets, skip-the-line, adventures. SDKs: None public. GDPR. 300,000+ activities in 11,000+ destinations. 45M+ bookings. Competes with Viator (TripAdvisor) and Klook for global experiences distribution.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Partner program required; sandbox testing available for approved partners
pricing.paid_tiers: Commission-based: typically 8-12% on each booking; affiliate program: 8% commission
pricing.notes: Berlin DE. KKR/SoftBank backed. $2B+ valuation. Commission-based partner pricing. EU GDPR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; search and availability APIs throttled; webhooks for booking status events

known_agent_gotchas: REAL-TIME AVAILABILITY BEFORE BOOKING: GetYourGuide activity availability must be checked immediately before booking; automated booking without live availability check creates booking_unavailable for sold-out time slots; automated search-results-as-available assumption creates high failure rate

PRODUCT-SPECIFIC CANCELLATION POLICY: GetYourGuide cancellation terms vary per product (free cancellation 24h, 48h, or non-refundable); automated uniform cancellation refund assumption creates non-refundable cancellation for strict-policy products

PARTNER APPROVAL GATES BOOKING API: GetYourGuide affiliate link API and booking API are separate tiers; automated booking with affiliate key creates read-only access; automated full booking capability requires partner program approval

PARTICIPANT COUNT AFFECTS PRICE: GetYourGuide pricing is per-participant with age groups (adult, child, senior); automated single-price assumption for group booking creates incorrect total; automated booking must specify participant count by age group

DIGITAL VOUCHER DELIVERY IS REQUIRED: GetYourGuide booking generates a QR-code voucher; automated booking confirmation without voucher delivery to customer creates unusable reservation; automated voucher must be delivered to customer email or app before activity date
agent_readiness.security_notes: Travel experiences marketplace. GDPR, PSD2. API key. EU/US. Booking and traveler personal data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Experiences OTA. GDPR, PSD2. API key. EU/US. Booking and traveler personal data.
